modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting to wireless network on Surface device

full_description_text:  
I am having big problems with the wifi. I can't connect to this network at all. My Surface is not working with the wireless. I keep trying but it says I can't connect. Please help me fix this issue with the wifi connection.
short_description: Trouble connecting to wireless network on Surface device
description: I am having big problems with the wifi. I can't connect to this network at all. My Surface is not working with the wireless. I keep trying but it says I can't connect. Please help me fix this issue with the wifi connection.
